allow: Bash(cd .. && cp -r CalorieAI_Project/* CalorieAI/ 2>/dev/null || true && ls -la CalorieAI)
Bash(echo $PATH | tr ':' '\\n' | grep -i android || echo "No Android paths found")

Bash(export ANDROID_HOME="/c/Users/syy/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk" && export PATH="$ANDROID_HOME/emulator:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools:$ANDROID_HOME/build-tools/36.1.0:$PATH" && echo "Environment configured" && which adb && which emulator)

Bash(export ANDROID_HOME="/c/Users/syy/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk" && export PATH="$ANDROID_HOME/emulator:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools:$PATH" && emulator -list-avds 2>/dev/null || echo "No AVDs found")

Bash(mkdir -p "$HOME/.android/avd/Pixel_7_API_34.avd/" && cat > "$HOME/.android/avd/Pixel_7_API_34.avd/config.ini" << 'EOF'
AvdId=Pixel_7_API_34
PlayStore.enabled=false
abi.type=x86_64
avd.ini.displayname=Pixel 7 API 34
avd.ini.encoding=UTF-8
disk.dataPartition.size=6442450944
fastboot.forceColdBoot=no
hw.accelerometer=yes
hw.arc=false
hw.audioInput=yes
hw.battery=yes
hw.camera.back=virtualscene
hw.camera.front=emulated
hw.cpu.arch=x86_64
hw.cpu.ncore=4
hw.dPad=no
hw.device.hash2=MD5:5c288dd95a1c1e2a2f2d1e5d0a5c1d5e
hw.device.manufacturer=Google
hw.device.name=pixel_7
hw.gps=yes
hw.gpu.enabled=yes
hw.gpu.mode=auto
hw.initialOrientation=Portrait
hw.keyboard=yes
hw.lcd.density=420
hw.lcd.height=2400
hw.lcd.width=1080
hw.mainKeys=no
hw.ramSize=2048
hw.sdCard=yes
hw.sensors.orientation=yes
hw.sensors.proximity=yes
hw.trackBall=no
tag.display=Google APIs
tag.id=google_apis
EOF
echo "Created AVD config")
